leadText: Water Path (Japanese: みずのさんぽみち Water Promenade) is a route in the Sevii Islands connecting Six Island, Green Path, and Ruin Valley.

sections.title: Route description
sections.text: Route description [ edit | edit source ] The Ultimate Horn [ edit | edit source ] In a house at the northern end of the route, there is a woman who likes big Heracross and wishes to see the "Ultimate Horn". If the player shows her a Heracross, she will measure its size and reward the player with a Nest Ball . After this, she will give away another Nest Ball for each Heracross the player shows her that sets a new size record. The current record is displayed on a chart on the back wall. Heracross can be caught in the nearby Pattern Bush .

sections.title: The Ultimate Horn
